cards.name: 6 of Pentacles
cards.interpretation: generosity, charity, community, material help, support, sharing, giving and receiving, gratitude

cards.name: Ⅵ The Lovers, reversed
cards.interpretation: disharmony, imbalance, conflict, detachment, bad choices, indecision

cards.name: Knight of Swords
cards.interpretation: assertive, direct, impatient, intellectual, daring, focused, perfectionist, ambitious
